title: Short-term memory in assistants
text: Short-term memory helps an assistant carry user facts, preferences, and recent context across a conversation without pretending to have permanent recall.

title: Retrieval augmented generation basics
text: Retrieval augmented generation combines a model with external documents so the final answer can be grounded in retrieved evidence instead of relying only on parametric memory.

title: Why keep memory and retrieval separate
text: Conversation memory and external retrieval serve different purposes. Memory stores what the user said earlier, while retrieval fetches information from a knowledge base or document set.
